<div style="float:right;">{{User:Zynix/Profile
|mcskin=210301 kt 1 01
|id=YOUR_ID
|name=Zynix
|title=YOUR_TITLE
|comment=YOUR_COMMENT<br>2026.04.13 made YYYY.MM.DD
|weapon=YOUR_FAVORITE_WEAPON
|summon=YOUR_FAVORITE_SUMMON
|char1=Character 1|ring1=
|char2=Character 2|ring2=
|char3=Character 3|art3=|ring3=
|char4=Character 4|ring4=
|char5=
}}</div>

<div style="float:left;">
__TOC__
</div>

{{clear}}

== Support Summons ==
{{User:Zynix/SupportSummon
|id=YOUR_ID
|fire1=Colossus Omega|ufire1=t5
|fire2=empty|ufire2=
|water1=Leviathan Omega|uwater1=t5
|water2=empty|uwater2=
|earth1=Yggdrasil Omega|uearth1=t5
|earth2=empty|uearth2=
|wind1=Tiamat Omega|uwind1=t5
|wind2=empty|uwind2=
|light1=Luminiera Omega|ulight1=t5
|light2=empty|ulight2=
|dark1=Celeste Omega|udark1=t5
|dark2=empty|udark2=
|misc1=Qilin|umisc1=mlb
|misc2=Huanglong|umisc2=mlb
|misc3=empty|umisc3=
|misc4=empty|umisc4=
}}

== Character Collection ==
{{/Collection Tracker}}

== [[/GW History|GW History]] ==
{{/GW History}}

== Misc Trackers ==
{{/Misc_Trackers}}
